CROSS-BORDER CONVERSIONS OF LIMITED LIABILITY
COMPANIES

[ L.S.386.27

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 386.27
REGOLAMENTI DWAR CROSS-BORDER
CONVERSIONS OF LIMITED LIABILITY
COMPANIES
31 ta’ Jannar, 2023

L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 27 tal-2023, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 68 tal2024.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
